snippet.title: BABYMONSTER - '춤 (CHOOM)' M/V
snippet.description:
춤 (CHOOM) 

1, 2 heat is on
Own it, burn it, kick it, flip that
3, 4 BABYMON
We gon get this party started

Walk in, stomping like we own the place
Trust me, I’m not just a pretty face
Yeah I know we’re seven but we ate
(We gon get this party started)
Know we got the style, we got the taste
Sweet and sour lemons, lemonade
Yeah I know we’re seven but we ate
Better run that, run that

Oh my oh my my
지금 이 순간
Oh my oh my my
Let it hypnotize
Loosen up, watch me set the mood
Burn it up, do it like I do
Lose your muh-muh-mind, play the music

Let’s choom
리듬을 삼켜 보자 Choom
(Watch out watch out)
We turn it up, let’s party
월 화 수 목 금 토 모두 다 함께 취해 보자 Choom
(Watch out watch out)
Choom choom choom choom choom

We wanna ride this vibe
Get out the way like vroom vroom
We only got tonight
You better dance like choom choom
Da da da da da da da

Baby check my style
Check me out
This that bling blow
Can’t stop now
Gotta keep it me like that, bow down
보여주마 나의 Choom choom choom

ASA be killing it, killing it woah
We don’t stop, top billing it, billing the show
Big flex, ain’t no up next
모두가 찍 소리 못하는 Groove
Like yes, I’m the empress
이 구역에 난 I’m a MONSTER queen

Oh my oh my my
지금 이 순간
Oh my oh my my
Let it hypnotize
Loosen up, watch me set the mood
Burn it up, do it like I do
Lose your muh-muh-mind, play the music

Let’s choom
리듬을 삼켜 보자 Choom
(Watch out watch out)
We turn it up, let’s party
월 화 수 목 금 토 모두 다 함께 취해 보자 Choom
(Watch out watch out)
Choom choom choom choom choom

We wanna ride this vibe
Get out the way like vroom vroom
We only got tonight
You better dance like choom choom

어둠이 짙게 내리고
이제 MONSTER party
No time to waste (Na na na)
Let’s celebrate (Na na na)
Baby 너와 나의 시간
Choom choom choom choom

That’s right
Everybody everybody make some room
Choom, that’s right
Choom choom choom choom choom
That’s right
Everybody everybody make some room
Choom, that’s right
Choom choom choom choom choom

#BABYMONSTER #베이비몬스터 #3rdMINIALBUM #춤 #CHOOM #MV #OUTNOW #YG

snippet.title: باقٍ هنا | حسين خير الدين
snippet.description:
{باق هنا}
الرادود حسين خير الدين
كلمات الشاعر خادم الولاية
الحان الحاج مهدي رسولي
تسجيل استديو: محمد خليفة
هندسة صوتية و توزيع قاسم حمادة
ترجمة روان شعيب

كلمات القصيدة:

(1)

باقٍ هُنا
I remain here

لاطِمُ الصَّدرِ أنا
I am one who beats his chest in mourning

أحمي حِما ديني وأَفدي الوَطَنا
I defend my faith and give myself in sacrifice for the homeland

باقٍ هُنا
I remain here

لاطِمُ الصَّدرِ أنا
I am one who beats his chest in mourning

فَصَّلتُ مِن ثوبِ عزائي الكَفَنا
From the cloth of my mourning, I have sewn my shroud

جُنديٌّ إنِّيَ في جَيشِ الحسين
I am a soldier in the army of al-Hussein (a.s)

بأسي مِن حامِلِ رايةِ الحسين
My strength comes from the bearer of al-Hussein’s banner

نصري في السُّوحِ على كُلِّ العِدا
My victory in the fields against every enemy

ما كانَ إلا بنداءِ: يا حسين
Has been through the call: “Ya Hussein”

إن شاء الله
By the will of Allah

وفتحٌ قريب
And a near triumph

⸻

(2)

بِاسمِ علي
In the name of Ali

رايتي بِاسمِ علي
My banner is in the name of Ali

رغمَ أعاديها ستبقى تعتلي
Despite its enemies, it will always rise high

باسمِ علي
In the name of Ali

رايتي بِاسمِ علي
My banner is in the name of Ali

أشمَخُ في الحَربِ شموخَ الجبَلِ
In battle, I stand tall like a mountain

في الميدانِ سيفُنا سيفُ علي
In the battlefield, our sword is the sword of Ali

مَن يَهوي في رَكبِنا مُستَشْهَدًا
Whoever falls among us as a martyr

حتمًا يستقبلُهُ حِجْرُ علي
Will surely be received in the embrace of Ali

إن شاء الله
By the will of Allah

وفتحٌ قريب
And a near triumph

⸻

(3)

ذا بَلَدي
This is my land

وَسِلاحي بِيَدي
And my weapon is in my hand

مِن صاحبِ الأمرِ المفدَّى مدَدي
My support comes from the Master of the Age, the one for whom we would sacrifice ourselves

ذا بَلَدي
This is my land

وَسِلاحي بِيَدي
And my weapon is in my hand

يقَطعُ كفَّ المُستَبِدِّ المُعتَدي
It strikes down the hand of the tyrant aggressor

ذا حَقِّي وَعنهُ لا لَستُ أَحيد
This is my right, and I will never turn away from it

لو أبقى وَسْطَ الميدانِ وَحيد
Even if I remain alone in the battlefield

لو ألقى ما ألقى مِن مِحَنٍ
Even if I face whatever trials I must

(مثلي لا يبايعُ مثلَ يزيد)
“One like me will never pledge to one like Yazid”

إن شاء الله
By the will of Allah

وفتحٌ قريب
And a near triumph

‏https://www.instagram.com/hussein_kheir_dine/


‏▶️ #facebook
‏https://www.facebook.com/HusseinHkd/


‏▶️ #Telegram
‏http://t.me/husseinhkd

snippet.title: RESIDENT EVIL – Official Teaser Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
𝙰 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚎𝚛𝚊 𝚘𝚏 𝚎𝚟𝚒𝚕.
 
From the mind of Zach Cregger, director of Weapons and Barbarian. Watch the new teaser trailer for Resident Evil. Filmed for IMAX – in theatres 9.18. 

https://www.instagram.com/residentevil/
https://twitter.com/ResidentEvil
https://www.facebook.com/ResidentEvilMovie
https://www.tiktok.com/@resident.evil.movie

From the mind of visionary filmmaker Zach Cregger (Weapons, Barbarian) comes a thrilling — and terrifying — reinvention of the Resident Evil franchise. In an all-new story, Resident Evil follows Bryan (Austin Abrams), a medical courier who unwittingly finds himself in an action-packed, non-stop race for survival as one fateful, horrifying night collapses around him in chaos.
 
From Columbia Pictures and Constantin Film, in association with TriStar Pictures, Resident Evil hits theatres September 18, 2026.

Directed by: Zach Cregger   
 
Written by: Zach Cregger & Shay Hatten    

Produced by:
Robert Kulzer
Zach Cregger
Roy Lee
Miri Yoon
Carter Swan
Asad Qizilbash

Executive Producers:
Oliver Berben
Victor Hadida
Richard Wright
Robert Bernacci

Cast:
Austin Abrams
Zach Cherry
Kali Reis
and Paul Walter Hauser

Credits not final

This film is not yet rated by The Motion Picture Association. For future rating information, please visit www.filmratings.com.  

#ResidentEvil #ResidentEvilMovie #ZachCregger #SonyPictures #OfficialTrailer #AustinAbrams #ZachCherry #KaliReis #PaulWalterHauser

snippet.title: اسماء بسيط  | الفارق ( Asma Bassite | Al fareq )
snippet.description:
#اسماء_بسيط #الفارق

كلمات : سعود النايف
الحان : فيصل المحمد 
توزيع : عبادي الكبيسي
جيتارات : شريف فهمي
بيز : أحمد نظمي 
كمنجات : أحمد أشرف  
ناي مزمار : علي المذبوح 
عود : عبدالله آل بم
ايقاعات : تركي البيشي
كورال : الشرقية 
مكس ماستر : م. جاسم محمد 
تركيب الصوت : م. موغازي
رسم صوت : م. محمد عصمت
مصممة الازياء : رولا جمال الدين
هيرستايلست : أمينة 
تصوير : ضيف الله بخيت 
مونتاج : عبدالرحمن سعود 
شكر خاص : نوف سعيد

انتاج : Creative Tracks

كلمات : 
الفارق اللي جعل من جابه الجنّة
ياهو مسوي بـ قلبي شي من زينه 
أدراه من هبة النسمات و أحنّه 
وأموت و احيا عشان أكون بـ يدينه 

ياما عطيته من إحساسي بلا منّه 
تفداه روحي عسى روحي فدا عينه 
أتنفسه حب و استشعره و أكنّه 
ويجوب في صدري و كلي بكفينه 

ماخذني لـ قلب جعلي ما خلا منّه 
وعساني أكون معه في باقي سنينه 
أظن و ظنوني اللي جت على ظنّه 
يا لعنبوا ظن شاقتني مضامينه 

أحب حبه و حبه صار لي كنّه 
سحابةٍ قد روت روضة بساتينه 
هذا حبيبي ولا أحدٍ عاضني عنّه 
واللي ما عنده مثيله ربي يعينه

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - begged (Saturday Night Live/2026)
snippet.description:
Presave 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out on June 12th: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Shop the collection: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Follow Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq


Lyrics

All that I want
Is to know undoubtedly
That you just have eyes for me
Could you make it clear
All that I want
Is to sit here silently
And watch movies on TV
What a shame you’re not here

Here to witness my devotion
And my endless well of needs
I’m an anchor in the ocean
You know I could never leave

So I’m patient
You’re learning
Pretend it’s not hurting
Ohh
They say it’s a virtue
To not let good love slip away
So I’m cool and forgiving
I’ll take what you’re giving
Ohh
But nothing’s quite enough
When I know that to get it I begged
Yeah to get it I begged

And I have this thought
When I lay in bed at night
That I feel trapped inside my life
Is that a normal thing
To fight back the waves
Of a static lovers’ dread
I’m overwhelmed, I’m underfed
And yet I still cling

Cling to hope like snow on mountains
Careless words melt it away
I’m a penny in a fountain
Just waiting on my luck to change

So I’m patient
You’re learning
Pretend it’s not hurting
Ohh
‘Cause they say it’s a virtue
To not let good love slip away
So I’m cool and forgiving
I’ll take what you’re giving
Ohh
But nothing’s quite enough
When I know that to get it I begged
Yeah to get it I begged


#OliviaRodrigo #SNL #begged
